- Add Opera/Chromium compatibility with feature detection for `tabGroups`, `sidePanel`
- Add `action.onClicked` fallback for browsers without side panel support
- Add `anthropic-dangerous-direct-browser-access` header for Claude API
- Fix duplicate tab key errors in state management (`TAB_UPDATED`, `WINDOW_CREATED`)
- Fix context menu duplicate ID error with `removeAll()` before create
- Create Chrome Web Store listing assets: `store/description.txt`, `store/permissions.md`
- Create privacy policy page: `docs/privacy.html`
